feed.title: 毛艳飞
feed.subtitle: 不知名计算机领域从业人员|未认证高级软件工程师|PMP项目管理专业资格人士却还在一线搬砖的新生代农民工

entry.title: Testing MathJax
entry.content:
Not Pure Poole supports MathJax. You can enable it on a page by setting math: true in the front matter.

An inline math: \(E=mc^2\).

A display math:

\[i\hbar \frac{\partial \Psi}{\partial t} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m} \frac{\partial^2 \Psi}{\partial x^2} + V \Psi\]
entry.summary: Not Pure Poole supports MathJax. You can enable it on a page by setting math: true in the front matter.

entry.title: Testing MathJax
entry.content:
Not Pure Poole supports MathJax. You can enable it on a page by setting math: true in the front matter.

An inline math: \(E=mc^2\).

A display math:

\[i\hbar \frac{\partial \Psi}{\partial t} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m} \frac{\partial^2 \Psi}{\partial x^2} + V \Psi\]
entry.summary: Not Pure Poole supports MathJax. You can enable it on a page by setting math: true in the front matter.

entry.title: Welcome to Not Pure Poole
entry.content:
Welcome to Not Pure Poole! This is an example post to show the layout.

First, do you notice the TOC on the right side? Try to scroll down to read this post, you’ll find that the TOC is always sticky in the viewport.

Cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis parturient montes, nascetur ridiculus mus. Aenean eu leo quam. Pellentesque ornare sem lacinia quam venenatis vestibulum. Sed posuere consectetur est at lobortis. Cras mattis consectetur purus sit amet fermentum.

Curabitur blandit tempus porttitor. Nullam quis risus eget urna mollis ornare vel eu leo. Nullam id dolor id nibh ultricies vehicula ut id elit.

Etiam porta sem malesuada magna mollis euismod. Cras mattis consectetur purus sit amet fermentum. Aenean lacinia bibendum nulla sed consectetur.

Inline HTML elements

HTML defines a long list of available inline tags, a complete list of which can be found on the Mozilla Developer Network.

  • To bold text, use <strong>.
  • To italicize text, use <em>.
  • To highlight, use <mark>.
  • Abbreviations, like HTML should use <abbr>, with an optional title attribute for the full phrase.
  • Citations, like — Mark Otto, should use <cite>.
  • Deleted text should use <del> and inserted text should use <ins>.
  • Superscript text uses <sup> and subscript text uses <sub>.

Most of these elements are styled by browsers with few modifications on our part.

Footnotes

Footnotes are supported as part of the Markdown syntax. Here’s one in action. Clicking this number1 will lead you to a footnote. The syntax looks like:

Each footnote needs the ^fn- prefix and a unique ID to be referenced for the footnoted content. The syntax for that list looks something like this:

You can place the footnoted content wherever you like. Markdown parsers should properly place it at the bottom of the post.

Heading

Vivamus sagittis lacus vel augue rutrum faucibus dolor auctor. Duis mollis, est non commodo luctus, nisi erat porttitor ligula, eget lacinia odio sem nec elit. Morbi leo risus, porta ac consectetur ac, vestibulum at eros.

Code

Inline code is available with the <code> element. Snippets of multiple lines of code are supported through Rouge. Longer lines will automatically scroll horizontally when needed. You may also use code fencing (triple backticks) for rendering code.

You may also optionally show code snippets with line numbers. Add linenos to the Rouge tags.

Aenean lacinia bibendum nulla sed consectetur. Etiam porta sem malesuada magna mollis euismod. Fusce dapibus, tellus ac cursus commodo, tortor mauris condimentum nibh, ut fermentum massa.

Lists

Cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis parturient montes, nascetur ridiculus mus. Aenean lacinia bibendum nulla sed consectetur. Etiam porta sem malesuada magna mollis euismod. Fusce dapibus, tellus ac cursus commodo, tortor mauris condimentum nibh, ut fermentum massa justo sit amet risus.

  • Praesent commodo cursus magna, vel scelerisque nisl consectetur et.
  • Donec id elit non mi porta gravida at eget metus.
  • Nulla vitae elit libero, a pharetra augue.

Donec ullamcorper nulla non metus auctor fringilla. Nulla vitae elit libero, a pharetra augue.

  1. Vestibulum id ligula porta felis euismod semper.
  2. Cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis parturient montes, nascetur ridiculus mus.
  3. Maecenas sed diam eget risus varius blandit sit amet non magna.

Cras mattis consectetur purus sit amet fermentum. Sed posuere consectetur est at lobortis.

HyperText Markup Language (HTML)
The language used to describe and define the content of a Web page
Cascading Style Sheets (CSS)
Used to describe the appearance of Web content
JavaScript (JS)
The programming language used to build advanced Web sites and applications

Integer posuere erat a ante venenatis dapibus posuere velit aliquet. Morbi leo risus, porta ac consectetur ac, vestibulum at eros. Nullam quis risus eget urna mollis ornare vel eu leo.

Images

Quisque consequat sapien eget quam rhoncus, sit amet laoreet diam tempus. Aliquam aliquam metus erat, a pulvinar turpis suscipit at.

Align to the center by adding class="align-center":

Tables

Aenean lacinia bibendum nulla sed consectetur. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

Name Upvotes Downvotes
Totals 21 23
Alice 10 11
Bob 4 3
Charlie 7 9

Nullam id dolor id nibh ultricies vehicula ut id elit. Sed posuere consectetur est at lobortis. Nullam quis risus eget urna mollis ornare vel eu leo.

Want to see something else added? Open an issue.

  1. Handy! Now click the return link to go back. ↩
entry.summary: Welcome to Not Pure Poole! This is an example post to show the layout.

entry.title: 安哥拉国家税务稽查系统（SIGT）

link.title: 安哥拉国家税务稽查系统（SIGT）

entry.content:
访问地址

https://portaldocontribuinte.minfin.gov.ao/liquidacao-de-receita-consignada

系统预览

💼 项目基础信息

项目名称：安哥拉国家税务稽查系统（SIGT）

项目属性：电子政务核心业务系统

协作团队：后端、前端、产品、测试、运维多角色协同

项目周期：2018-2020

🧾 项目背景

安哥拉国家税务稽查系统属于安哥拉国家税务综合管理系统的核心服务模块，借鉴国家税务总局（北京）电子税务系统经验，服务于安哥拉国家税务总局（AGT），对外面向企业/个人提供在线办理税务申报、算税、查询、生成税票等功能，对内面向税务人员稽查专用，包含纳税人数据管理、申报审批、税票管理等功能。覆盖全网纳税人外网办税门户、税务内网稽查审批后台，支撑税收征管、申报稽查、多级审批全业务闭环，系统至今官方线上稳定运行。

⚙️ 技术栈

后端：Java 8、Spring Boot

前端：Vue2 + Element UI、Angular、ECharts

数据库：Oracle

中间件：Activiti、Nginx、RabbitMQ

👨‍💻 我的负责内容 & 核心职责

全程深度参与业务开发与迭代，主要负责：

1、日常对接业务人员与产品同事，负责常规业务需求接收、梳理与落地开发，精准理解税务复杂业务流程，按规范拆解开发任务；独立负责开发纳税人资料管理、线上申报核算、税票查询、电子凭证下载归档等核心业务模块，代码规范、功能稳定，按期完成每一轮迭代开发工作。

2、配合完成多方系统联调工作，负责编写后端标准业务接口、配合前端完成页面功能对接与适配优化；主动配合现场实施人员，完成真实业务数据对接、业务参数调试、环境适配以及上线前后测试校验，保障功能顺利投产上线、无线上问题。

3、服从团队开发安排，配合组长完成日常开发任务执行，主动分担重点难点开发工作；日常做好代码自查优化，配合团队把控开发质量与进度；积极参与组内技术交流，复用公共组件与规范接口，稳步支撑项目多轮迭代，保障税务征管、稽查相关业务平稳运行。

📈 项目成果 & 业务价值

1、将线下办税、稽查审批全部转为线上办理，统一操作入口，简化办事流程，业务流转更顺畅。

2、减少大量人工录入、纸质跑腿等重复工作，有效提升税务人员日常办公效率。

3、统一规范涉税数据标准，提升后台数据监管能力，辅助异常行为风险预警。

4、系统全程平稳运行，无线上重大问题，顺利通过官方验收，长期常态化投入正式使用。

💡 个人收获

刚毕业时（2018年6月）深度参与的大型电子政务级项目，可以说入门就见识了高安全、高规范、高稳定性要求下的开发标准，潜移默化地为我以后对工作质量的要求奠定了基础。

但各种复杂的业务数据、核算逻辑、审批流程让我一度顾此失彼，穷于应付，好在经过百折不挠的努力，尽职尽责地胜任了所有工作，不仅学到了各种业务、技术知识，还真正的做到了让自己在工作中能够沉下心去解决各种棘手的问题。

另外大型项目随之而来的大团队协同开发、跨团队合作、跨区域交流、信息同步、责任边界、任务推进，让我在个人软实力方面也得到了快速的提升，能够适应规范化的职场协作节奏，懂得高效同步对接、合理划分工作边界、及时上报协同攻坚，快速完成从新人到独立上手干活的职场过渡。

不得不说这段初入职场的宝贵经历，彻底褪去了我学生时代的青涩与浮躁，也打磨出抗压攻坚、踏实肯干的职业素养，让我在后续各类工作挑战中始终保持严谨态度、从容应对，稳步实现个人专业能力与综合素养的持续成长。
